review_title: Great tool for getting more genuine users
description: In our platform, through RingCaptcha only we gain around 15-20% more users. This is a great leap for us as it helped our business profit a lot.
author: Minnu D.
pros: We really like the way RingCaptcha works as it helps our business a lot. We began to get more users who are verified by OTP and is more chance to be a premium user. I had myself a personal experience with RingCaptcha. As I use it on other site, the OTP is delivered within seconds. Here on our business 2FA and user analytics are made easy by using RingCaptcha. Our user engagement is done more effectively by adopting RingCaptcha into our platform. In general this is a great tool for running business and attracting more customers into our system.
cons: The one little drawback we feel is with the pricing and lack of developer docs. Pricing is a bit high for small startups. We although are a paid customer, we are not using all the modules on the RingCaptcha system and hence it considered as a not needy one. It would be nice if they could make different pricing models so that everyone benefits.

review_title: Great tool for our genuine user aqusition
description: On my new firm I see a lot of business happen over RingCaptcha and I see this tool as a great tool for small companies if the price is not taken to consideration.
author: THOMAS K.
pros: I myself helped to integrate RingCaptcha into our Job search platform, and we really feel the difference. Our user base increased dramatically with more genuine customers. The core good thing about RingCaptcha is that people can who join through this platform are 100% genuine and we don't need to re verify them. Their user on-boarding process is typically simpler as compared to their competitors. We are really interested on the user retention method that is used by RingCaptcha. Through this we can engage our users and gain more revenue.
cons: The only thing that we feel bad is the cost, small companies like the one I work cannot afford them and also we don't need the entire platform. So it could be nice if you could introduce shared pricing models.

description: Great interface, great system when it works - bad support and when it doesn't work, it completely doesn't work.
author: Paul R.
pros: It's a very nice looking interface thats visually appealing to the user, and when it works, it works well.
cons: There is a constant failure in delivery of SMS. It's blamed on users not inputting their codes in the app, however my messages sent per day and confirmation rate remains pretty steady, with spikes in failures - showing downtime. I'll get no complaints from users, then for 2-3 days my support queue will be filled with users complaining that no confirmation codes are being received. This is my main complaint. Another time they had almost 2 days of downtime where their widget didn't even show - after chasing them up, they told me they were performing maintenance - yet informed nobody via email. The next issue is they they've double billed me multiple times. If I didn't spot it on my bank, they wouldn't have notified me as it certainly doesn't show in my balance. I'm made to reach out multiple times and chase up with with these problems - with my support messages usually left on "Read". An apology for any of the above would have been appreciated, but not being overbilled and the system just working would be better.

review_title: RingCaptcha a great tool for user onboarding
description: In overall our business has increased in about 20% just by using RingCaptcha, great tool. A part from pricing we are happy with it.
author: EBIN E.
pros: We rely on RingCaptcha for getting verified users into our platform, and we believe that RingCaptcha is doing its part in a great manner. We are getting more verified users into our system by integrating RingCaptcha. The major advantage we feel is that the entire process is faster as compared to their competitors. We feel that the users OTP and Messages are delivering fast to the users so that they can sign up into our system in a much more fast manner. This is a great potential to us, we really thank RingCaptcha for their time critical service.
cons: The only problem we see is the pricing model, they should have introduced varies model rather than just 2, it could be useful for users to purchase the components needed for them. All others are good.

description: In general, Ring captcha provides good quality service with decent price/quality ratio especially for not-very-expirienced developers
author: Alexander S.
pros: Ringcaptcha is our solution of choice for SMS phone verification because it is super easy to use
cons: Comparing to major competitors like Twilio, Ringcaptcha pricing could be better

review_title: Awesome platform to confirm genuine users
description: We are very much satisfied in using this software, it is a genuine platform. It makes our clients do their work on timely basis that as they don't have issues with the users. It is a great software which also got our team into profit.
author: Jyothika J.
pros: We have been using this software for a while, which brings our company with more genuine users for our system. It is very easy to use and process when compared to other software. The OTP and other messages receive our users in a very fast processing. I really appreciate the platform team for introducing this wonderful software, now we have no more issues in choosing our genuine users. Even our company revenue has been quite increased with the help of this platform.
cons: I don't have much negatives to point out, the only thing is about its cost that is small companies or startups may not be able to afford the price.

review_title: Great tool for User aqusition and user onboarding
description: Our user acquisition level has increased by the use of RingCaptcha, also we began to get more verified users by using this tool.
author: Ashly E.
pros: We really like RingCaptcha as it is one of our main source for user acquisition, one of the users suggest it to me. At first I taught of it as a regular tool but it has some cool unique features. Verified users can be bought into our system using RingCaptcha, so we don't need to verify them manually. This is really a nice product for startups as we will get more genuine users. Also the SMS delivery is very fast irrespective of the country your in.
cons: The only problem is with the pricing models, they cant be afford for small companies. Also I would suggest them to add more plans on the go so that users can buy exactly what they want.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: RingCaptcha is the definition of an all-in-one app as it helps my organisation carry out functions that would have taken multiple apps to deliver. With the nature of our brand dependent on constantly keeping tabs with clients, customers and prospects, RingCaptcha makes it easier and smarter to keep up with them, close deals quicker than usual, and increase our revenue.
author: Lindsay E.
pros: The functionality of the features of the software is what makes me look forward to using it everytime. I don't lose sleep for fear of fraudulent activities as the One-Time Password and 2FA features takes total control of that. The SMS services is as fast as a flash and it helps our brand in communicating effectively with our clients and customers which leads to healthy customer relationship, retention, relevance, and closing of deals.
cons: In all honesty, i really do wish they could work on the pricing policy as it doesn't favour start up brands like the one i work with. If they can come up with plans that is suitable for all forms of brands, then every cent invested on buying the software will be well worth it without regretting at all.

description: Ringcaptcha has extremely been good i enjoy using it
author: Daramola G.
pros: I cherish RingCaptcha because it prrovide effective,efficient and reliable technology for phone verification (sms,missed call,voice).Using secured forms like nexmo,twilio,infobip,message bird.Ring Captcha has a very really good well developed front and back end software with alternative route for sending messages.
cons: late arrival of otp sms at times whenever i want to do verification
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It made the overall process easy for me and prevented fraud/ghost users from using my services.

cons: Delay in response from support team when I send emails.

This product helps a lot in growing our business.

cons: The ringcaptcha panel is not supported on mobile browser which is definitely good. whenever we are on move it becomes combersome to see panel. If you are not making your website compatible, pls provide mobile app.

Ringcaptcha has many more features like sending app link via SMS to users who needs it and many more. Its really a cool tool to work with.

cons: Hummmm, i have nothing much to say but i could remember that it took me some time to get familiar with their user interface but as time goes on , its became as easy to use

description: As a salesperson, managing contacts and keeping up with potential clients is tiresome and could be draining. I have always struggled to keep up with this but RingCaptcha made it easier than expected and I have been able to drive more sales over the course of the year.

description: Transactional fraud checks; Verification of real users in our database which has been so useful in the elimination of dual entry.
